headlines.title: Ukraine rescuers pull dead from rubble after Russian strikes kill 18 people
headlines.summary: An eight-year-old boy and a woman killed in a strike on an apartment block are among the dead, officials say.

headlines.title: Clashes continue in Lebanon despite Israel and Hezbollah accepting US partial ceasefire plan
headlines.summary: A cessation of hostilities between Israel and Hezbollah is seen as crucial to the peace process with Iran.

headlines.title: Pope Leo XIV makes historic apology for Vatican's role in legitimizing slavery
headlines.summary: Pope Leo XIV issued a historic apology for the Vatican's historical role in legitimizing slavery.

headlines.title: Russia's combat losses reach approximately 1,366,910 personnel since February 2022
headlines.summary: Ukrainian forces report 1,440 Russian troops killed over the past day as fighting continues.

headlines.title: Putin resisting pressure to reduce defense spending despite economic strain
headlines.source: Institute for the Study of War
headlines.summary: Russian President Putin reportedly resisting calls to reduce defense spending despite warnings from economic officials about unsustainable strain.

headlines.title: Asian stocks find footing as investors return to AI plays despite Middle East doubts
headlines.summary: Asian stocks stabilized in unsteady trading as investors shrugged off doubts about Middle East ceasefire durability.

headlines.title: Global smartphone market facing steepest annual contraction on record
headlines.summary: Smartphone shipments projected to slump 13.9% this year to 1.08 billion units due to worsening memory chip shortage.

headlines.title: Two people shot dead amid Kenya protests against US Ebola quarantine centre plan
headlines.summary: The US plan has sparked public anger and led to demonstrations near the site of the proposed treatment facility.

headlines.title: China cracks down on 'ghost kitchens' to rein in cut-throat food delivery apps
headlines.summary: Thousands of online shops that don't actually exist have spooked Chinese consumers, prompting government action.

headlines.title: AI giant Anthropic plans to sell shares in US as valuation nears $1 trillion
headlines.summary: The AI company behind Claude is set to offer the public the chance to buy and sell shares later this year.
